nasb.text: Before the chambers was an inner walk ten cubits wide, a way of one hundred cubits; and their openings were on the north.

esv.text: And before the chambers was a passage inward, ten cubits wide and a hundred cubits long, and their doors were on the north.

cnv.text: 房子前面有一條夾道，寬五公尺，長五十公尺。房子的門都朝向北面。

ccb.text: 在两排厢房之间有一条五米宽、五十米长的通道，厢房的门都向北。
